metadata.description: On-brand proposal and landing tools for the LeCharge commercial team.

plugins.name: lecharge-core
plugins.description: Orientation, brand rules, and Linear issue tracking. Install first.

plugins.name: lecharge-proposals
plugins.description: Generate on-brand client proposals as a vertical document or landscape deck, HTML and PDF.

plugins.name: lecharge-landing
plugins.description: Make on-brand edits to the LeCharge landing site via safe pull requests.
